official_sources.function_or_member: KnownPack.vanilla(String), STREAM_CODEC, namespace(), id(), version(), isVanilla()
official_sources.authority_note: Decompiled witness path for the known-pack record when restored; the jar remains authoritative.

field_notes.vanilla_pack_id: The harness passes this id into official KnownPack.vanilla(String); expected namespace, version, list body, frame bytes, and packet id are generated by the official jar.

stop_boundary: Proves Configuration serverbound select_known_packs packet framing and dispatch/decode only; do not infer registry hydration, known-pack negotiation completion, Configuration completion, or Play readiness.
